phase_name: G-Dimension PWA — UI Build (Build Sheet polish session)

completed_tasks.name: iOS long-press fix (all icon screens) + stagger delay reduction
TuningBuildSheetPage + TuningAddPage (empty grid, spec list, add flow)

TuningBuildSheetPage full redesign: 'Where you are.' header (Cormorant Garamond italic), burgundy date chip, dark radial gradient behind hero car photo, 4 alternating mod sections (Power/Chassis/Exterior/Interior) with grey photo placeholders, brand+title inline silver, orange FAB

TuningAddPage category picker: black bg, per-tile box-shadow (burgundy left / blue bottom OUTSIDE box), label inside tile, 74px icons, 3x5 no-scroll grid, Add to Build Sheet → burgundy, Add DIY Steps → blue, saveErr error display added
Brakes icon mix-blend-mode: multiply — BROKEN, makes icon invisible on dark background
completed_tasks.progress: Applied but wrong — needs immediate revert next session

remaining_tasks.name: URGENT FIRST: Revert brakes icon mix-blend-mode in TuningAddPage
remaining_tasks.notes: File: src/pages/TuningAddPage.tsx ~line 124. Remove `mixBlendMode: cat.id === 'Brakes' ? 'multiply' : undefined` from img style. multiply on #0a0a0c bg makes entire icon black/invisible. Alternative fix: edit the PNG with sips or just leave the white center for now — visible icon > perfect icon.

remaining_tasks.name: Diagnose Wheels/Intake/Paint not appearing in build sheet
remaining_tasks.notes: saveErr is now displayed in TuningAddPage form. Have user try adding a Wheels item — if error shows, it's a DB constraint. Check Supabase: SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE category IN ('Wheels','Intake','Paint') — if rows exist, filter logic issue. Check jobs table for CHECK constraint on category column.

remaining_tasks.name: TuningBlueprintPage — wishlist mods + add form
remaining_tasks.notes: Same pattern as TuningBuildSheetPage but status='planned'. Import TUNING_CATEGORIES. Same 4 group layout. Add form: /tuning/add?status=planned&category=X

remaining_tasks.name: TuningPartsPage (Parts Bin) — shelf parts + add form (status='purchased')

blockers.description: Brakes icon invisible — mix-blend-mode: multiply on dark bg (#0a0a0c) made entire icon disappear
blockers.workaround: Remove mixBlendMode from TuningAddPage img style immediately. Accept white rotor center for now or fix PNG separately.

blockers.description: Wheels/Intake/Paint mods not saving or not appearing in build sheet
blockers.workaround: Error display now added to form. Try adding, read error. Check Supabase jobs table for category CHECK constraint.

human_actions_pending.context: Two Datsun rows: id 36758 (keep) and id 2863 (NHTSA duplicate)

human_actions_pending.action: Run Estima SQL if not done
human_actions_pending.context: INSERT INTO public.vehicle_models (make_id, model_name, year_start, year_end, is_jdm_only, body_style, source) SELECT id, 'Estima', 1990, 2019, true, 'minivan', 'jdm_manual' FROM public.vehicle_makes WHERE make_name ILIKE 'Toyota' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

human_actions_pending.action: Future DB migration for build sheet photo columns (when ready for photo upload feature)
human_actions_pending.context: ALTER TABLE public.cars ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS build_sheet_power_photo text, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS build_sheet_chassis_photo text, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS build_sheet_exterior_photo text, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS build_sheet_interior_photo text

decisions.decision: iOS press feedback via onPointerDown/onPointerUp state, not CSS :active

decisions.rationale: Shared by Blueprint, PartsPage, AddPage — single source of truth

decisions.decision: Build Sheet title: 'Where you are.' in Cormorant Garamond italic
decisions.rationale: User wanted personality over plain 'Build Sheet'

decisions.decision: Build Sheet header: flat black, burgundy date chip — matches carousel/snapshot pattern
decisions.rationale: Consistency — no SVG wedges on this screen

decisions.decision: 4 mod groups: Power (Engine/Drivetrain/Exhaust/Cooling/Fuel System/Intake), Chassis (Suspension/Brakes/Wheels), Exterior (Exterior/Paint), Interior (Interior/Audio/Safety/Electrical)
decisions.rationale: Hot Version spec card groupings. Alternating left/right layout per section.

decisions.decision: Section photo placeholders (#1e1e20 grey boxes) — real photos deferred to DB migration
decisions.rationale: Needs 4 new columns on cars table + Supabase storage wiring

decisions.decision: Electrical stays in Interior by default; per-item override deferred to DB migration
decisions.rationale: No build_sheet_group column yet on jobs table

decisions.decision: TuningAddPage tile shadow: box-shadow OUTSIDE black box (not gradient inside)
decisions.rationale: User wanted colored shading to lift the box off background, not color the interior
Negative spread prevents bleeding to top/right

decisions.decision: Add to Build Sheet: burgundy. Add DIY Steps: blue. FAB on build sheet: COLOR_ACCENT orange.
decisions.rationale: Cohesive color story — green removed from these screens

next_action: FIRST: remove mixBlendMode from TuningAddPage img (line ~124) to restore Brakes icon. THEN: diagnose Wheels/Intake/Paint — have user add one and read saveErr. Check Supabase jobs table for category CHECK constraint.
context_notes: Dev server: npx vite --port 5176 --host. Supabase: uxqoernfrtgclpneirvc. tsc clean. Build sheet is Hot Version spec card — hero (car photo + identity), then 4 alternating sections (details left/photo right, flip each). TuningAddPage 3x5 grid uses gridTemplateRows: repeat(5,1fr) + flex:1 to fill screen without scroll. Both modified files uncommitted.
